_meta.purpose: Hand-written AI-flavoured essay snippets for plan-M8 pipeline structure tests. NOT for accuracy claims — these are deliberate caricatures so the rule + ngram detector reliably fires on them and the polish pass has visible work to do. For honest gate numbers, point the benchmark driver at RAID (Dugan et al., ACL 2024) via the [bench] extra; this bundled set exists so CI without GPU/network still exercises the full polish + score pipeline.
_meta.license: CC0 — written by the humanize-en authors for testing.
design_rules: Each sample fires at least 5 distinct rule violations on the rule detector (verified by tests/bench/test_pipeline_structure.py).
Topics deliberately span news / academic / blog / business so the polish prompts (which select rule subsets by scene) all see relevant input.
